description: Z vf 1 1 A year ago 2125 A SAFE PLACE TO TkADE Dhave r TlimfTWlw ii ir p ff ji MRS E ELLISON SUCCUMBS TO PNEUMONIA AFTER SHORT ILLNESS The hearts of the thousands of friends of Mrs Olivia Ellison wife of Engle B Ellison senior member of E Ellison Sons Fair Store were made sad when it was learned that she had passed to the Great Beyond at 810 oclock Monday morning after an illness of eight dayB from pneu monia Mrs Ellison had gone to Rochester Minn to be with her hus band who has been seriously ill for some time and while there contract ed a cold She returned to Minot with her husband two weeks ago to day and became worse rapidly The funeral was held from the First Lutheran church Wednesday after noon at 2 oclock a large concourse of friends gathering to pay their last tribute of love and respect to her memory Brief services were held at the home prior to the services at the church The pastor of the church Rev T F Gullixson was in charge of the services at the church and at the Lutheran cemetery svhere inter ment
